text:

From-To: open->repocopy

Keep a version of this port which is compatible with  
games/linux-enemyterritory-omni-bot-0660 which has a different gameplay than 
games/linux-enemyterritory-omni-bot. The updated version of this port will be 
compatible with version 2.2.0 of games/linux-enemyterritory-jaymod
